type.description: Format type recognised by Debezium Server.

image.description: Image used for Debezium Server container. This property takes precedence over version.

predicates.description: Predicates employed by this instance of Debezium Server.

type.description: Fully qualified name of Java class implementing the predicate.

quarkus.description: Quarkus configuration passed down to Debezium Server process.

runtime.description: Configuration allowing the modification of various aspects of Debezium Server runtime.

enabled.description: Whether the API should be enabled for this instance of Debezium Server

port.description: Port number used by the k8s service exposing the API

environment.description: Additional environment variables used by this Debezium Server.

from.description: Additional environment variables set from ConfigMaps or Secrets in containers.

vars.description: Environment variables applied to the container.

accessFile.description: JMX access file name and secret key

enabled.description: Whether JMX authentication should be enabled for this Debezium Server instance.

passwordFile.description: JMX password file name and secret key

enabled.description: Whether JMX should be enabled for this Debezium Server instance.

configFrom.description: Config map key reference which value will be used as configuration file

serviceAccount.description: An existing service account used to run the Debezium Server pod

data.description: File storage configuration used by this instance of Debezium Server.

claimName.description: Name of persistent volume claim for persistent storage.

imagePullPolicy.description: Image pull policy for the container.

liveness.description: Liveness probe configuration applied to the container.

failureThreshold.description: Number of failures in a row before the overall check has failed.

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before probes are initiated.

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the probe.

timeoutSeconds.description: Number of seconds after which the probe times out.

readiness.description: Readiness probe configuration applied to the container.

failureThreshold.description: Number of failures in a row before the overall check has failed.

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before probes are initiated.

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the probe.

timeoutSeconds.description: Number of seconds after which the probe times out.

imagePullSecrets.description: List of local references to secrets used for pulling any of the images used by this Pod.

annotations.description: Annotations added to the Kubernetes resource

labels.description: Labels added to the Kubernetes resource

nodeSelector.description: NodeSelector is a selector which must be true for the pod to fit on a node.

securityContext.description: Pod-level security attributes and container settings

tolerations.description: Tolerations applied to the pod to allow scheduling on tainted nodes.

volumeClaim.description: PVC template for data volume if no explicit claim is specified.

type.description: Sink type recognised by Debezium Server.

class.description: Fully qualified name of source connector Java class.

configMap.description: Config map backed offset store configuration

name.description: Name of the offset config map

fileName.description: Name of the offset file (relative to data root)

flushMs.description: Interval at which to try commiting offsets

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retries on connection failure

password.description: Password used to connect to the storage database

retryDelay.description: Retry delay on connection failure (in milliseconds)

table.description: The configuration of the offset table

ddl.description: DDL statement to create the offset table

delete.description: Statement used to update the offset table

insert.description: Statement used to insert into the offset table

name.description: The name of the offset table

select.description: Statement used to select from the offset table

user.description: Username used to connect to the storage database

bootstrapServers.description: A list of host/port pairs that the connector uses for establishing an initial connection to the Kafka cluster

partitions.description: The number of partitions used when creating the offset storage topic

replicationFactor.description: Replication factor used when creating the offset storage topic

topic.description: The name of the Kafka topic where offsets are to be stored

enabled.description: In case of Redis with replica, this allows to verify that the data has been written to replica

retry.description: Enables retry on wait for replica

timeoutMs.description: Timeout in ms when waiting for replica

type.description: Fully qualified name of Java class implementing the store.

config.description: Additional common schema history store configuration properties.

file.description: File backed schema history store configuration

fileName.description: Name of the offset file (relative to data root)

jdbc.description: JDBC backed schema history store configuration

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retries on connection failure

password.description: Password used to connect to the storage database

retryDelay.description: Retry delay on connection failure (in milliseconds)

table.description: The configuration of the offset table

dataExistsSelect.description: Statement used to check existence of some data in the schema history table

ddl.description: DDL statement to create the schema history table

insert.description: Statement used to insert into the schema history table

name.description: The name of the offset table

select.description: Statement used to select from the schema history table

user.description: Username used to connect to the storage database

kafka.description: Kafka backed schema history store configuration

bootstrapServers.description: A list of host/port pairs that the connector uses for establishing an initial connection to the Kafka cluster

partitions.description: The number of partitions used when creating the offset storage topic

replicationFactor.description: Replication factor used when creating the offset storage topic

topic.description: The name of the Kafka topic where offsets are to be stored

memory.description: Memory backed schema history store configuration

redis.description: Redis backed schema history store configuration

enabled.description: In case of Redis with replica, this allows to verify that the data has been written to replica

retry.description: Enables retry on wait for replica

timeoutMs.description: Timeout in ms when waiting for replica

type.description: Fully qualified name of Java class implementing the store.

transforms.description: Single Message Transformations employed by this instance of Debezium Server.

negate.description: Determines if the result of the applied predicate will be negated.

predicate.description: The name of the predicate to be applied to this transformation.

type.description: Fully qualified name of Java class implementing the transformation.

version.description: Version of Debezium Server to be used.

message.description: Human-readable message indicating details about the condition’s last transition.

status.description: The status of the condition, either True, False or Unknown.
